name: studio.get_analytics_overview
description: Fetch the site-level analytics overview: visitors, sessions, pageviews, bounce rate, top pages, for a time window.
whenToUse: Reporting flow: summarize last-30-days traffic for an operator status update.
Content prioritization: identify the top pages to decide where to invest the next editorial cycle.
Post-launch validation: confirm traffic shifted correctly after a site rename or redirect rollout.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants per-page detail — use studio.get_page_analytics; this skill is site-wide rolled-up only.
Caller wants SEO rank data — use studio.list_keywords; analytics is behavioral, not search-rank.
Caller wants real-time (<1min) activity — this endpoint is batch-aggregated; use a streaming analytics source for live views.
